import py_compile, sys
files = [
    'keymap_visualizer/__init__.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/constants.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/state.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/layout.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/hit_testing.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/keymap_data.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/export.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/drawing.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/handlers.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/operators.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/preferences.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\)
        print\(f'  OK: {f}'\)
    except py_compile.PyCompileError as e:
        print\(f'FAIL: {f} -- {e}'\)
        ok = False
if ok:
    print\('\\nAll files passed syntax check.'\)
else:
    print\('\\nSome files FAILED.'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
")

import ast, sys
files = [
    'keymap_visualizer/drawing.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/handlers.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/operators.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/keymap_data.py',
    'keymap_visualizer/__init__.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, 'r'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'{f}: OK'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'{f}: SYNTAX ERROR: {e}'\)
        ok = False
if ok:
    print\('All files OK'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image
import glob, os

for png in glob.glob\('G:/Personal/blenderKey/keymap_visualizer/icons/**/*.png', recursive=True\):
    img = Image.open\(png\)
    if img.size != \(64, 64\):
        img_resized = img.resize\(\(64, 64\), Image.LANCZOS\)
        img_resized.save\(png\)
        print\(f'Resized: {os.path.basename\(png\)}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'Already 64x64: {os.path.basename\(png\)}'\)
")

from PIL import Image
import glob
sizes = set\(\)
for png in glob.glob\('G:/Personal/blenderKey/keymap_visualizer/icons/**/*.png', recursive=True\):
    img = Image.open\(png\)
    sizes.add\(\(img.size, img.mode\)\)
print\(f'All icons: {sizes}'\)
print\(f'Count: {len\(list\(glob.glob\(\\"G:/Personal/blenderKey/keymap_visualizer/icons/**/*.png\\", recursive=True\)\)\)}'\)
